tools.name: start_growth_plays_experience
tools.description: Open the BlueConic Growth Plays quiz widget in ChatGPT. Use this when the user wants to open, take, continue, or restart the BlueConic Growth Plays quiz to get a growth play recommendation. Do not use this for general questions about BlueConic, for non-interactive growth advice, or when the user only wants a text explanation. Do not call this again if the quiz is already open unless the user explicitly asks to restart or reopen it.
